# Team allowlist for automated AI code review
#
# One GitHub username per line. PRs authored by users on this list get
# the automated review. Comparison is case-insensitive.
#
# Rules:
#   - Blank lines and lines starting with `#` are ignored.
#   - Leading/trailing whitespace is ignored.

castulo
benjaminkomen
evanbiskey
vedgenerac
jordanjkelly12
kuznetsov-sergei
